changeSet.author: nexus-24p05
changeSet.comment: Create retention_markers table (verify-fill watermark rollback detector)
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE nexus.retention_markers ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, relation TEXT NOT NULL, total_deleted BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT retention_markers_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, relation) );
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.retention_markers CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-24p05
